name: UNS Discover
UNS Live Filter
Object Manager UI
Dispatch
Build DDL
func:
// DDL: catalog tables + migrate-or-create uns_obj_<type> tables
// Schema canonical: (key_value VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY, attribute JSONB,
//                    created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP)
msg.query = [
    // ── Catalog tables ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.object_types (" +
    "  object_type_id   VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY, " +
    "  object_type_name VARCHAR(100), " +
    "  description      TEXT, " +
    "  attributes       JSONB, " +
    "  created_at       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()" +
    ");",
    "ALTER TABLE public.object_types ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS object_type_code SERIAL;",

    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.object_mappings (" +
    "  id              SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, " +
    "  object_type_id  VARCHAR(50), " +
    "  mapping_name    VARCHAR(100), " +
    "  rules           JSONB, " +
    "  created_at      TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), " +
    "  updated_at      TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), " +
    "  UNIQUE(object_type_id, mapping_name)" +
    ");",
    "ALTER TABLE public.object_mappings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS id_path VARCHAR(200);",

    // ── Migrate + create uns_obj_<type> tables ────────────────────────
    // For each registered object_type:
    //   1. CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS với schema mới
    //   2. Nếu bảng đã có cột cũ (object_id / content_object), ALTER RENAME
    //   3. Tạo các indexes
    "DO $do$ DECLARE " +
    "    r RECORD; " +
    "    tbl TEXT; " +
    "    has_old_id  BOOLEAN; " +
    "    has_old_doc BOOLEAN; " +
    "    has_new_key BOOLEAN; " +
    "    has_new_att BOOLEAN; " +
    "BEGIN " +
    "  FOR r IN SELECT object_type_id FROM public.object_types LOOP " +
    "    tbl := 'uns_obj_' || regexp_replace(lower(r.object_type_id), '[^a-z0-9_]', '_', 'g'); " +

    // 1. Create with new schema if not exists
    "    EXECUTE format('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.%I (" +
    "      key_value  VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY, " +
    "      attribute  JSONB, " +
    "      created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), " +
    "      updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW())', tbl); " +

    // 2. Detect legacy schema and migrate (lossless rename)
    "    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns " +
    "                   WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name=tbl AND column_name='object_id') " +
    "      INTO has_old_id; " +
    "    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns " +
    "                   WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name=tbl AND column_name='content_object') " +
    "      INTO has_old_doc; " +
    "    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns " +
    "                   WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name=tbl AND column_name='key_value') " +
    "      INTO has_new_key; " +
    "    SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns " +
    "                   WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name=tbl AND column_name='attribute') " +
    "      INTO has_new_att; " +

    "    IF has_old_id AND NOT has_new_key THEN " +
    "        EXECUTE format('ALTER TABLE public.%I RENAME COLUMN object_id TO key_value', tbl); " +
    "        RAISE NOTICE 'Renamed %.object_id → key_value', tbl; " +
    "    END IF; " +
    "    IF has_old_doc AND NOT has_new_att THEN " +
    "        EXECUTE format('ALTER TABLE public.%I RENAME COLUMN content_object TO attribute', tbl); " +
    "        RAISE NOTICE 'Renamed %.content_object → attribute', tbl; " +
    "    END IF; " +

    // Defensive: if both old and new cols exist (from manual half-migration), abort that table
    "    IF has_old_id AND has_new_key THEN " +
    "        RAISE NOTICE 'Table % has BOTH object_id and key_value — manual cleanup needed', tbl; " +
    "    END IF; " +

    // 3. Indexes (idempotent)
    "    EXECUTE format('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS %I ON public.%I(updated_at DESC)', " +
    "                   'idx_'||tbl||'_updated', tbl); " +
    "    EXECUTE format('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS %I ON public.%I USING GIN (attribute)', " +
    "                   'idx_'||tbl||'_attribute', tbl); " +
    "  END LOOP; " +
    "END $do$;"
].join(' ');
msg.params  = [];
msg.payload = null;
node.warn('[OBJ] DDL init: migrate-or-create uns_obj_* (key_value, attribute) — auto rename legacy columns');
return msg;

func:
// DDL: inc_sync_schedules + inc_sync_log (Node-RED catalog)
// Lưu ý: migrate.sh có thể seed thêm vào dw_sync_schedules — bảng riêng, không xung đột.
msg.query = [
    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.inc_sync_schedules (" +
    "  jde_table        VARCHAR(50)  PRIMARY KEY, " +
    "  pg_table         VARCHAR(80)  NOT NULL, " +
    "  oracle_schema    VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT 'SYSTEM', " +
    "  ts_col           VARCHAR(30)  DEFAULT 'glupmj', " +
    "  last_max_cursor  BIGINT       DEFAULT 0, " +
    "  interval_sec     INT          DEFAULT 300, " +
    "  enabled          BOOLEAN      DEFAULT true, " +
    "  last_run_at      TIMESTAMP, " +
    "  last_rows_synced INT          DEFAULT 0, " +
    "  last_status      TEXT, " +
    "  updated_at       TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()" +
    ");",

    "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.inc_sync_log (" +
    "  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, " +
    "  jde_table   VARCHAR(50), " +
    "  started_at  TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), " +
    "  finished_at TIMESTAMP, " +
    "  cursor_from BIGINT, " +
    "  cursor_to   BIGINT, " +
    "  rows_synced INT, " +
    "  status      VARCHAR(20), " +
    "  error_msg   TEXT" +
    ");",
    "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_inc_log_table ON public.inc_sync_log(jde_table, started_at DESC);"
].join(' ');
msg.params  = [];
msg.payload = null;
node.warn('[INC] DDL initialized (inc_sync_schedules + inc_sync_log)');
return msg;

name: Op: Save Table
func:
var d = msg.payload || {};
var pgTbl = String(d.pg_table || '').toLowerCase();
msg.query =
    "INSERT INTO public.inc_sync_schedules " +
    "  (jde_table, pg_table, oracle_schema, ts_col, interval_sec, last_max_cursor, enabled) " +
    "VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, true) " +
    "ON CONFLICT (jde_table) DO UPDATE SET " +
    "  pg_table        = EXCLUDED.pg_table, " +
    "  oracle_schema   = EXCLUDED.oracle_schema, " +
    "  ts_col          = EXCLUDED.ts_col, " +
    "  interval_sec    = EXCLUDED.interval_sec, " +
    "  last_max_cursor = EXCLUDED.last_max_cursor, " +
    "  enabled         = true, " +
    "  updated_at      = NOW()";
msg.params = [
    d.jde_table,
    pgTbl,
    d.oracle_schema || 'SYSTEM',
    String(d.ts_col || 'glupmj').toLowerCase(),
    d.interval_sec || 300,
    d.last_max_cursor || 0
];
msg.payload = null;
return msg;

name: Emit Saved
func: msg.topic = 'inc-saved'; msg.payload = { ok: true }; return msg;

func:
msg.query = "SELECT table_name, mapping, mqtt_enabled, mqtt_topic, COALESCE(source_mode,'table') AS source_mode, COALESCE(custom_sql,'') AS custom_sql FROM public.jde_table_mappings ORDER BY table_name";

name: Rows→JSON
Load Mapping SQL
Row→JSON
Save Mapping SQL

Existing uns_obj SQL
Build stats SQL
func:
var rows = msg.payload || [];
var parts = rows.map(function(r){ return 'SELECT count(*) c FROM public.uns_obj_' + String(r.sfx).replace(/[^a-z0-9_]/g,''); });
var objCnt = parts.length ? "(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c),0) FROM (" + parts.join(' UNION ALL ') + ") z)" : '0';
msg.query =
  "SELECT json_build_object(" +
  "'status','online'," +
  "'generated_at', NOW()::text," +
  "'heartbeat', (SELECT max(started_at)::text FROM public.inc_sync_log)," +
  "'kpis', json_build_object(" +
    "'uns_topics', (SELECT count(*) FROM public.jde_table_mappings WHERE mqtt_enabled) + (SELECT count(*) FROM public.object_types)," +
    "'jde_syncs', (SELECT count(*) FROM public.inc_sync_log)," +
    "'objects', " + objCnt + "," +
    "'errors', (SELECT count(*) FROM public.inc_sync_log WHERE status='error')," +
    "'today', (SELECT count(*) FROM public.inc_sync_log WHERE started_at::date = CURRENT_DATE)" +
  ")," +
  "'events', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(e),'[]'::json) FROM (" +
    "SELECT started_at::text AS started_at, jde_table, COALESCE(rows_synced,0) AS rows_synced, " +
    "COALESCE(status,'') AS status, COALESCE(error_msg,'') AS error_msg " +
    "FROM public.inc_sync_log ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20) e)," +
  "'schedules', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(s),'[]'::json) FROM (" +
    "SELECT jde_table, lower(pg_table) AS pg_table, enabled, COALESCE(last_status,'') AS last_status, " +
    "COALESCE(last_rows_synced,0) AS last_rows_synced, last_run_at::text AS last_run_at " +
    "FROM public.inc_sync_schedules ORDER BY jde_table) s)" +
  ") AS payload";
msg.params = []; msg.payload = null; return msg;

name: Stats→JSON
Err→JSON
func: msg.statusCode=msg.statusCode||500;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify({error:String((msg.error&&msg.error.message)||msg.error||'Internal error').slice(0,300)});return msg;

name: List Schedules SQL
func: msg.query="SELECT jde_table, lower(pg_table) AS pg_table, oracle_schema, ts_col, interval_sec, last_max_cursor, enabled, last_run_at::text AS last_run_at, last_rows_synced, last_status, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM public.inc_sync_schedules ORDER BY jde_table";msg.params=[];msg.payload=null;return msg;

name: Rows→JSON
func: msg.statusCode=200;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify(msg.payload||[]);return msg;

name: Catalog→JSON
func:
var CAT=[
{jde_table:'F0101',name:'Address Book',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:300},
{jde_table:'F0411',name:'A/P Ledger (Voucher)',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:300},
{jde_table:'F0901',name:'Account Master',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:600},
{jde_table:'F0911',name:'Account Ledger',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:60},
{jde_table:'F3002',name:'Bill of Material',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:600},
{jde_table:'F3003',name:'Routing Master',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:600},
{jde_table:'F4101',name:'Item Master',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:600},
{jde_table:'F4102',name:'Item Branch',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:600},
{jde_table:'F4111',name:'Item Ledger (Cardex)',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:60},
{jde_table:'F4301',name:'PO Header',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:60},
{jde_table:'F4311',name:'PO Detail',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:60},
{jde_table:'F43099',name:'PO Detail History',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:300},
{jde_table:'F43199',name:'PO Receipt Ledger',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:60},
{jde_table:'F4801',name:'Work Order Master',ts_col:'upmj',interval_sec:300}
];
CAT.forEach(function(c){ c.pg_table='v2_pro_'+c.jde_table.toLowerCase(); c.oracle_schema=(c.jde_table==='F0911')?'SYSTEM':'TIPA_ESB'; });
msg.statusCode=200;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify(CAT);return msg;

name: Toggle SQL
Toggled→JSON
func: msg.statusCode=200;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify({ok:true,jde_table:msg._t.jde,enabled:msg._t.en});return msg;

name: Run Now SQL (CTE)
Run→JSON
func: var rows=msg.payload||[];msg.statusCode=200;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify({ok:rows.length>0,jde_table:msg._jde,logged:rows.length>0});return msg;

name: Delete SQL
Deleted→JSON
func: msg.statusCode=200;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify({ok:true,jde_table:msg._jde});return msg;

name: Err→JSON
func: msg.statusCode=msg.statusCode||500;msg.headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'};msg.payload=JSON.stringify({error:String((msg.error&&msg.error.message)||msg.error||'Internal error').slice(0,300)});return msg;
